_comment: Maps each gold-set CSV to its tender PDF + the page range the gold covers. Add an entry when you finish labelling a tender (see labelling-guide.md). Set "draft": true for in-progress / example-only gold so the aggregate eval skips it. Run: python -m engine.scripts.eval_all

tenders.title: MAC Museum Cleaning Services ITT
tenders.note: RE-LABELLED 2026-07-02 (J-055 item 3) — the old 92-row CSV was mis-sourced (SPSO-2013 content bolted onto the MAC/Belfast PDF, 88/92 falsely is_gating=true) and was quarantined draft:true (see comms G-014/B-002). Replaced with a fresh 75-row hand-label read directly from the real 41pp data/tenders/museum-cleaning-itt.pdf, page/clause-referenced, mandatory/optional enum, is_gating=true reserved for explicit disqualification/elimination/Pass-Fail language only (10/75 = 13.3% gating, vs the old 96%). draft:true removed — included in the scored aggregate. See comms board-backend B-011/B-012.

tenders.title: WLWA Acton Infrastructure ITT
tenders.note: IN PROGRESS — Jawad hand-labelling the deal-breakers (J-072). draft:true so eval_all skips it until the answer key is filled in; flip to false (or ping J) when done.
